response.original_title: Tales of Voodoo Volume 2: Ghost Ninja / Primitives
response.overview: Ghost Ninja: The deadly shadow warriors mix forces with the Undead to torture the living in Ghost Ninja!  Primitives: Deadly Traps and human fleas loving natives make this jungle a no fly zone!
response.tagline: 2 DVD FEATURES - Bold... Shocking Terror with GHOST NINJA - The eerie and scraifying PRIMITIVES
